PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: Alpha Memes funerals
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: a funeral shaped by an unusual ideology - write the pawn's own goodbye through the ceremony's solemnity, strangeness, or macabre tenderness

instructions.li: an unusual funeral - keep the dead person at the center while sky, flame, launch, preservation, or transformation gives grief its chosen shape
an unusual funeral - write whether the ceremony felt right, absurd, merciful, or unbearable to this pawn from their assigned place in it
an unusual funeral - hold sorrow beside the ritual's physical detail; dark humor is welcome only when the supplied rite genuinely carries it

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: solemn and strange, grief moving through a chosen rite

tones.li: macabre but tender, the ceremony making loss tangible
ceremonial and grief-heavy, with room for one absurd human detail
quietly reverent, however unfamiliar the farewell looks

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: Alpha Memes rituals
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: an unusual communal rite - write spectacle, catharsis, or collective madness from the pawn's actual role, without explaining the ideology as a mechanic

instructions.li: an unusual rite - stay inside the pawn's role and senses while the colony turns belief into spectacle, contest, initiation, or destruction
an unusual rite - write the release afterward: pride, embarrassment, relief, or the charged silence left when everyone stops
an unusual rite - let the supplied title decide whether this is joyous, absurd, fervent, or frightening; do not force every ceremony dark

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: ceremonial, unruly, and alive with collective feeling

tones.li: fervent and physical, belief acted out in public
strange but communal, spectacle carrying real emotional weight
cathartic and unsettled, the colony briefly moving as one body

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: Alpha Memes aftereffects
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: the aftereffect of an unusual rite - write pride, unease, relief, or the hangover of collective fervor as a feeling still settling

instructions.li: ritual aftereffect - name the feeling that stayed when the spectacle ended, not the thought mechanic
ritual aftereffect - keep it to one honest residue: satisfaction, revulsion, embarrassment, awe, or exhausted relief

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: with the charged aftertaste of collective ritual

tones.li: inward and unsettled, public fervor turning private
spent but vivid, the ceremony still clinging to the senses

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: Baptism speeches
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: a public initiation or naming speech - write the exposure of standing before everyone, or the responsibility of speaking the words over someone else

instructions.li: a baptism speech - write the room, the watching faces, and what this public beginning asks of the pawn
a baptism speech - center initiation and belonging; quote nothing that the rendered interaction did not supply

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: formal and exposed, a new belonging named in public

tones.li: solemn and watchful, every face turned toward the rite
hopeful but vulnerable, identity being spoken aloud

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: Ritual fervor
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: ritual catharsis or righteous fervor lingering in the body - fold the relief, confidence, or dangerous certainty into the day's reflection

instructions.li: ritual fervor - write the bodily release or sharpened certainty left after the rite, without naming a hediff or stat
ritual fervor - notice whether relief feels clean, borrowed, or close to becoming another kind of compulsion

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: relieved and fervent, with an edge that has not fully cooled

tones.li: cathartic and spent, pressure finally finding a way out
righteous and charged, confidence close to becoming zeal
